pinpoint.apnsvoipsandboxchannel.Applicat.Description: The unique identifier for the application that the APNs VoIP sandbox channel applies to.

pinpoint.apnsvoipsandboxchannel.BundleId.Description: The bundle identifier that's assigned to your iOS app. This identifier is used for APNs tokens.

pinpoint.apnsvoipsandboxchannel.Certific.Description: The APNs client certificate that you received from Apple. Specify this value if you want Amazon Pinpoint to communicate with the APNs sandbox environment by using an APNs certificate.

pinpoint.apnsvoipsandboxchannel.DefaultA.Description: The default authentication method that you want Amazon Pinpoint to use when authenticating with APNs. Valid options are `key` or `certificate`.

pinpoint.apnsvoipsandboxchannel.Enabled.Description: Specifies whether the APNs VoIP sandbox channel is enabled for the application.

pinpoint.apnsvoipsandboxchannel.PrivateK.Description: The private key for the APNs client certificate that you want Amazon Pinpoint to use to communicate with the APNs sandbox environment.

pinpoint.apnsvoipsandboxchannel.TeamId.Description: The identifier that's assigned to your Apple developer account team. This identifier is used for APNs tokens.

pinpoint.apnsvoipsandboxchannel.TokenKey.Description: The authentication key to use for APNs tokens.
The key identifier that's assigned to your APNs signing key. Specify this value if you want Amazon Pinpoint to communicate with the APNs sandbox environment by using APNs tokens.
